petsCatalogList.name: Camel
petsCatalogList.desc: A sturdy camel, perfect for desert travels.

egg.name: Camel egg
egg.desc: The egg left behind by a camel, you can tell because it has a hump on it. That's how you tell, right?

petsCatalogList.name: Chicken
petsCatalogList.desc: A lively chicken, known for their exceptional eggs and foraging abilities.

egg.name: Chicken egg
egg.desc: A fertile chicken egg. Don't get it confused with your breakfast, hurry and hatch it!

petsCatalogList.name: Dolphin
petsCatalogList.desc: An intelligent dolphin, able to move fast through the water. It will always thank you for all the fish.

egg.name: Dolphin egg
egg.desc: The egg of a dolphin. The aquatic colour hides it well underwater. It is a wonder the parents can ever find them again.

petsCatalogList.name: Gecko
petsCatalogList.desc: A mysterious gecko, has all sorts of secrets that are ensured to be kept quiet.

egg.name: Gecko egg
egg.desc: This egg came from a gecko. It is looking a little green, so might want to hatch it soon!

petsCatalogList.name: Mummy
petsCatalogList.desc: An unruffled mummy, may look dressed in rags, but knows all best ways to make them last.

egg.name: Mummy egg
egg.desc: A mummy's egg. It may be covered in bandages, but you should still try to keep it warm. Wonder where the mother is?

petsCatalogList.name: Reindeer
petsCatalogList.desc: A cheerful reindeer, can prance through snowy places with ease and still have energy to spare.

egg.name: Reindeer egg
egg.desc: A reindeer's egg. Should get this warmed up more even though the fur coating helps keep it a little warmer.

petsCatalogList.name: Tiger
petsCatalogList.desc: A powerful tiger, boasting strength, stealth, and speed all in one.

egg.name: Tiger egg
egg.desc: The egg from a tiger. You would think it would have stripes on it too, but you'll have to hatch it for those.

petsCatalogList.name: Tortoise
petsCatalogList.desc: A reserved tortoise, just holding steady. Slowly, but steadily.

egg.name: Tortoise egg
egg.desc: A tortoise egg. It has an extra hard shell to it. Guess it will never be without one.
